where.if: AND (1=0 OR a.file_nm ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' OR a.stored_nm ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' )

if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND a.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND a.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND a.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND a.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyAttach :: selectById */ a.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM sy_attach a LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = a.site_id WHERE a.attach_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(a.*) /* base.sy :: SyAttach :: selectPageCount */ FROM sy_attach a
